name: Detect High-Frequency Admin API Access
description: Alert when administrative API endpoints receive more than 20 requests per minute from a single IP address
remediation: Implement rate limiting on administrative endpoints and consider IP-based access controls for sensitive operations

name: Monitor Unusual SMTP Traffic
description: Flag outbound SMTP traffic (port 25) from application servers that don't normally send email
remediation: Review server configuration and consider blocking outbound SMTP traffic from application servers unless explicitly required

name: Large S3 Data Transfer Alert
description: Alert when S3 data transfers exceed 500MB in a single session for sensitive buckets
remediation: Implement data loss prevention controls and require additional authentication for large data transfers from sensitive buckets

name: Root Account Administrative Actions
description: Alert on any administrative actions performed by root account outside of emergency procedures
remediation: Establish proper IAM delegation and restrict root account usage to emergency break-glass procedures only

name: Brute Force Authentication Detection
description: Detect and alert on potential brute force attacks based on failed login patterns followed by success
remediation: Implement account lockout policies, CAPTCHA verification, and consider IP-based rate limiting for authentication endpoints
